case_title: PHILLIP PEARSON VS. CLUB NAUTIQUE LLC

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA ISSUED TO DON DURANT, 1150 BALLENA #161, ALAMEDA CA 94501
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEARSON, PHILLIP IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CLUB NAUTIQUE LLC PLAINTIFF DID NOT SHOW THAT HE WAS ENTITLED TO RETURN OF THE CLAIMED AMOUNTS UNDER THE MEMBERSHIP AGREEMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,158.00 FILED BY PEARSON, PHILLIP AS TO DEFENDANT CLUB NAUTIQUE LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT CLUB NAUTIQUE LLC
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $110.00) SERVED JUL-11-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CLUB NAUTIQUE LLC
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM FILED BY PEARSON, PHILLIP CLUB NAUTIQUE LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-07-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DON DURANT, PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
